Vendored less.js test fixtures
==============================

Upstream:  https://github.com/less/less.js
Tag:       v4.6.7
Commit:    8ae2cc3bfa79f0718ad6fe5f263a1d6819fe9d5c
License:   Apache-2.0 (see less-testdata/LICENSE)
Vendored:  by crates/magecommand-less/scripts/vendor-less-testdata.sh

What is vendored (STEP 2 scope — DEFAULT-OPTION compile fixtures only)
---------------------------------------------------------------------
less-testdata/tests-unit/   The default-option compile+diff corpus. Each
                            <name>.less with a sibling <name>.css is a test
                            entry (plan §5.1); subdirectories hold import
                            helpers. Runs under less.js's own `tests-unit`
                            group, which sets only relativeUrls/silent/
                            javascriptEnabled — treated as "default options"
                            here (the harness passes LessOptions::default()).
less-testdata/data/         Binary assets (image.jpg/.svg, data-uri-fail.png,
                            page.html) for the data-uri/image-size fixtures
                            (plan §C-assets), wired through the harness's
                            filesystem ImportResolver.

ALSO VENDORED (Phase 4B — the option-driven compile corpus, plan §5.2)
----------------------------------------------------------------------
less-testdata/tests-config/   The option-driven compile fixtures: namespacing,
                              rewrite-urls-*/rootpath-*, static-urls, url-args,
                              include-path(+string), strict-imports,
                              process-imports, globalVars/modifyVars (+ their
                              per-file .json vars), units/{strict,no-strict},
                              math-{always,strict,parens-division} (goldens
                              under math/<mode>/ — the upstream layout),
                              at-rules-compressed*/compression (xfail until
                              the §C4 compress serializer), and 3rd-party.
                              Options from the deleted cosmiconfig
                              `styles.config.cjs` files are transcribed into
                              the harness's `config_options` table.
less-testdata/node_modules/bootstrap-less-port/
                              The npm package (0.3.0, MIT — LICENSE included)
                              the 3rd-party/bootstrap4 fixture imports.

STILL NOT VENDORED (see NOTES.md, plan §5.2/§5.4/§8)
----------------------------------------------------
- tests-error/   the error-message fixtures (byte-exact err.toString()) — a
                 later increment.
- tests-config plugin dirs (filemanagerPlugin, postProcessorPlugin,
  preProcessorPlugin, visitorPlugin), debug/ (dumpLineNumbers), sourcemaps*,
  js-type-errors/no-js-errors — JS/plugin/source-map surface, out of scope
  for a pure headless compiler (plan §5.2/§8).

Within tests-unit, the harness additionally SKIPS the `javascript/`, `plugin/`,
`plugin-module/`, `plugin-preeval/` sub-suites (JS/plugin — plan §5.2). The
`plugi/` and `parser-property-interp` typo dirs stay IN (false-positive-JS,
plan §5.2).

Refreshing on a tag bump
------------------------
Run scripts/vendor-less-testdata.sh (edit TAG + EXPECT_SHA first). Node is not
needed for this step; regenerating the option manifest in later phases is a
documented Node-toolchain maintenance dependency (plan §G-node).
